required_validation_commands: if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'packages/shared/dist/index.js') -or -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'packages/shared/dist/index.d.ts')) { throw 'Shared package build output missing.' }
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'packages/txline-client/dist/index.js') -or -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'packages/txline-client/dist/index.d.ts')) { throw 'TxLINE client build output missing.' }
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'apps/api/dist/server.js')) { throw 'API server build output missing.' }
if ((Test-Path -LiteralPath 'apps/api/dist/apps') -or (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'apps/api/dist/packages')) { throw 'API build escaped the expected output boundary.' }

$unexpected = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath 'packages/shared/src','packages/txline-client/src' -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.js' -or $_.Name -like '*.d.ts' -or $_.Name -like '*.js.map' -or $_.Name -like '*.d.ts.map' }); if ($unexpected.Count -ne 0) { throw ('Unexpected source-tree build artifacts: ' + (($unexpected.FullName) -join ', ')) }
pnpm.cmd --filter @matchpulse/api exec node --input-type=module -e "await import('@matchpulse/shared'); await import('@matchpulse/txline-client');"
expected_results: shared package typecheck and build pass
shared package emits dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts from src
TxLINE client typecheck, build, and tests pass
TxLINE client emits dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts from src
API output does not contain dist/apps or dist/packages
no JavaScript or declaration output is emitted beside workspace TypeScript sources
built workspace package entry points are importable from the API workspace

git_publish.commit_message: Complete BUILD-INFRA-A workspace package build boundary
